title: helianthus hirsutus var. leoninus
intro: Helianthus hirsutus var. leoninus, also known as a variety of rough-haired sunflower, is a plant species native to North America, characterized by its hairy stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being and address specific health issues.
